creator: litmuschaos

evidence.text: - **ChaosExperiment**: A resource to group the configuration parameters of a particular fault. ChaosExperiment CRs are essentially installable templates that describe the library carrying out the fault, indicate permissions needed to run it & the defaults it will operate with. Through the ChaosExperiment, Litmus supports BYOC (bring-your-own-chaos) that helps integrate (optional) any third-party tooling to perform the fault injection.

organizational_mechanism: organizational chaos experiments and reliability learning

relevance_evidence: The repository documents organizational chaos experiments and reliability learning; this is an organizational operating mechanism, not generic agent-memory research.
